name: Volcdramon
description: A volcanic dragon Digimon that inhabits the magma beds of the active volcanoes that dot the Digital World. It is said that volcanic eruptions occur due to the activity of Volcdramon, so the Digital World's volcanologist s study not volcanic activity, but the activity of Volcdramon and the stirring of volcanoes. Although its appearance is that of a terrifying figure, its personality is gentle, and it is not the type to like conflict. However, if it's offended just once, you will surely suffer its scorching attacks like a "raging fire". Its Special Moves are spraying super-heated magma ( Volcanic Fount ), and making everyone nearby faint ( Circle of Death ).
